ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name of the Pokémon */,
  "combat_power" INTEGER /* Combat power of the Pokémon */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Hit points of the Pokémon */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon in kilograms */,
  "weight_bin_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weight category */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon in meters */,
  "height_bin_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the height category */,
  "fast_attack_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the fast attack */,
  "charge_attack_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the charge attack */,
  "base_happiness" INTEGER /* Base happiness of the Pokémon */,
  "capture_rate" INTEGER /* Capture rate of the Pokémon */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the Pokémon (e.g., slow, medium, fast) */,
  "hatch_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps required to hatch the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_fast_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("fast_attack_id") REFERENCES attacks ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_weight_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_bin_id") REFERENCES weight_categories ("weight_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_charge_attack_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_attack_id") REFERENCES attacks ("attack_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_height_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("height_bin_id") REFERENCES height_categories ("height_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_categories" (
  "weight_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the weight category */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for the category */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "height_categories" (
  "height_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the height category */,
  "min_height" REAL /* Minimum height for the category */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height for the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the height category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("height_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attacks" (
  "attack_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attack */,
  "attack_name" TEXT /* Name of the attack */,
  "attack_type" TEXT /* Type of the attack (e.g., physical, special) */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the attack */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the attack */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Power points of the attack */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the attack */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attack_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, trainer, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_pokemon, edit_pokemon) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_evolution" (
  "evolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evolution */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Pokémon */,
  "evolved_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the evolved Pokémon */,
  "evolution_method" TEXT /* Method of evolution (e.g., level_up, stone_evolution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_evolution_evolved_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("evolved_pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the Pokémon */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "move_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon can learn the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)
